---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new template or an improvement to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

A clear and concise description of what you want. Is this a new template, an upgrade to an existing one, or a change to shared infrastructure?

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think it should work. Include relevant versions, frameworks, or configurations if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or examples.
